name: TAPLA Premium Light
description: Основной стиль TAPLA MARKETPLACE — светлый премиум. Для большинства товаров.

design_spec.background: Clean white-to-light-grey studio sweep, no patterns, no textures, gradient #FFFFFF to #F5F5F5
design_spec.lighting: Three-point studio lighting: key front-left softbox, fill front-right 40%, rim top-back. Soft shadows only.
design_spec.color_palette: Product natural colors. TAPLA charcoal #2D2D2D + gold #C9A96E accents. Price badges black/white.
design_spec.composition: Product center 60% of frame. Text top 15% and bottom 15%, never overlap product. 15% breathing room.
mandatory_elements: TAPLA logo bottom-right, small, watermark 30% opacity
forbidden: Neon effects, lens flares, heavy vignetting

text_rules.language: AZERBAIJANI LATIN ONLY. Never English. Never Russian.
